seed_library.py ML_PAPERS contains 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (2014) by Ian J. Goodfellow, Jean Pouget-Abadie, and Mehdi Mirza. Published in NeurIPS proceedings and arXiv https://arxiv.org/abs/1406.2661

privileged_info_summary: The task uses three real, seminal machine learning papers: (1) 'Deep Learning' by LeCun, Bengio, and Hinton (Nature 2015), (2) 'Attention Is All You Need' by Vaswani et al. (NeurIPS 2017), and (3) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' by Goodfellow et al. (NeurIPS 2014). The custom citation style 'Journal of Applied AI' is synthetically generated for this task with style ID 'journal-of-applied-ai' and contains the unique marker '[JAA]'. The citation style file is created at /home/ga/Documents/journal-of-applied-ai.csl and the output bibliography should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/bibliography.rtf.
